name: Holiday Entertainment Co.,Ltd
summary: Holiday Entertainment Co., Ltd. provides karaokes and audiovisual equipment in Taiwan. The company operates through Audiovisual Equipment and Copyright Works businesses. It also engages in the management and consultancy for karaoke, as well as restaurant operations. In addition, the company distributes and sells audiovisual equipment and supplies, including boxes. As of December 31, 2013, it operated 52 branches. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
